title: Buttery Velvety Romantic Chinese Tomato Pasta
description: A low-fat-friendly twist on a classic Chinese tomato pasta dish featuring creamy butter and caramelized tomatoes.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the pasta and cook until al dente, about 3 minutes less than the package instructions.
In a separate pan over medium heat, melt the butter with minced garlic. Stir in the drained tomatoes and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the cooked pasta to the tomato mixture, along with the steamed or blanched broccoli florets. Toss well until everything is evenly coated with the sauce.
Squeeze some fresh lemon juice over the pasta and sprinkle the grated Parmesan cheese on top before serving. Garnish with chopped basil leaves.
